title: Vāsudevanallūr Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Vāsudevanallūr with a Z-Score of +3.11. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave in Vāsudevanallūr has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The heat wave is characterized by high temperatures and high humidity, with an Umidita of 71% and a Vento of 7.4 km/h. 
 The CDD is at 9.9 GG, indicating a significant increase in cooling degree days, while the HDD remains at 0.0 GG.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
